description_long: This envelope is elaborately designed with a deep blue patterned exterior and reinforced gold corner protectors, giving it a premium and formal appearance. A thick, twisted brown cord is tied in a bow on the front, serving as a decorative closure. The envelope features a metallic nameplate with engraved characters, suggesting it may be used for important documents or ceremonial purposes. Along the sides, there are visible paper inserts and colored tabs, indicating the presence of internal contents or dividers. The spine and back are solid black, contrasting with the blue and gold accents. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a blend of traditional and modern design elements.
description: A blue and black envelope with gold corner protectors, a brown cord closure, and a metallic nameplate, featuring visible paper inserts and colored tabs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the brown cord tied in a bow, the metallic nameplate, and gold corner protectors.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the envelope, visible paper inserts, and the gold corner protectors.
description_view_2: Back view displays the cord bow, metallic nameplate, and all four gold corner protectors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals colored tabs and paper inserts protruding from the envelope.
